items.summaryEn: ⚡️⭕️ A security source for the "Maariv" newspaper: - For the first time, Hezbollah launched last night a heavy "Scud C" missile from deep within Lebanon towards southern "Israel", a launch that led to the activation of warning sirens in the Gaza envelope area. - The "Scud C" is a Russian missile with a range of up to 300 kilometers, carrying hundreds of kilograms of explosive materials.
